description: Canonical five-role organization permission matrix. Backend (backend/src/authorization/policy.py) and frontend (frontend/src/features/organizations/permissions.ts) each assert equality against this fixture in their test suites so role semantics cannot drift between the two enforcement and presentation layers. The backend is the only authorization authority; the frontend uses this contract solely to decide which controls to render.

rules.self_administration: administrative member actions never target the actor's own membership
rules.last_owner: the final active owner cannot be revoked, suspended, or demoted
rules.suspended_or_revoked_membership: grants no permissions in any organization
rules.cross_organization: a role in one organization grants nothing in any other organization
